meta.title: Effectively Using IEC 62443 Product Certifications
meta.description: The size of the IEC 62443 standards can be daunting for an asset owner. Khalid Ansari provides a very practical session at S4x22 on the certifications available for three of standards, in this family of standards, and how they can be used (and misused) by an asset owner.
